notes: GIF assets are converted to temporary MP4 with ffmpeg before upload.
This media judge is evidence-quality QA; it does not replace backend/browser production gates.

asset.title: App Manual Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, concise demonstration of manual variance editing in the spreadsheet, showing real-time versioning and trace updates.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates clicking '+ add' to input a variance, which immediately updates the cell and the trace.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the complete flow from v1 (empty variance) to action (click) to v2 (updated cell and trace log).

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode spreadsheet layout with high contrast and clear focus on the edited row.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's core elements: versioned spreadsheets, collaborative room traces, and financial rows.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and audit logs.

legibility.evidence: Spreadsheet values and trace logs are readable, though bottom text is slightly small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial analysts tracking manual adjustments in collaborative models.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the version bump and trace logging without artificial transitions.

observedEvidence: Version bump from v1 to v2
Room trace event logging the edit

defects.observed: The variance value '+20.5%' appears instantly without showing an active input field or typing state.
defects.fix: Show a brief typing animation or active cursor state to make the manual edit feel more natural.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Manually edit cell values or variances to instantly update the sheet version and log the action in the collaborative room trace.

defects.observed: The video remains static from 00:02 to 00:07 after the enrichment completes.

asset.title: L2 Edit
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step visualization of a Compare-And-Set (CAS) edit workflow on a versioned spreadsheet cell. The sequence demonstrates locking, reading, writing, and committing changes with high visual clarity.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step annotations clearly explain the CAS mechanism, including locking, reading, writing, and committing.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: The sequence covers the entire lifecycle from initial state, locking, version checking, writing, to final commit and lock release.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with clear highlighting of active rows and a progress indicator at the bottom.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the collaborative spreadsheet and versioned agent execution model of NodeRoom.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity UI capture that effectively demonstrates the logical flow of the system.

legibility.evidence: Text, version numbers, and status badges are highly legible with good contrast.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers and technical users interested in concurrency control and data integrity.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the logical steps of a CAS transaction without overclaiming.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Visualizing the Compare-And-Set (CAS) protocol: NodeRoom agents lock the target cell, verify the version, commit the update, and release the lock to prevent write collisions.

asset.title: L3 No Clobber
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step animation demonstrating optimistic concurrency control (CAS) when a human edits a cell mid-write, forcing the agent to re-read and commit safely.

featureClarity.evidence: The step-by-step progression clearly illustrates the CAS conflict and subsequent resolution.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state, the conflict occurrence, the re-read of V2, and the final V3 commit.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode layout with clear row highlighting and progress indicators.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with the spreadsheet-based agent collaboration model.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Provides a high-fidelity conceptual walkthrough of the concurrency protocol.

legibility.evidence: Text, version chips, and status labels are highly readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for engineers designing multi-agent or human-in-the-loop transactional systems.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the conflict state and the necessity of a re-read before committing.

observedEvidence: Agent action log at the bottom
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how NodeRoom's CAS protocol prevents clobbering: when a human edits a cell mid-write, the agent detects the conflict, re-reads the new value, and safely commits V3.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom sync messages and spreadsheet updates instantly across multiple clients as a server-led agent reconciles financial data in real time.

asset.title: Noderoom Live Collab V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: The video effectively demonstrates a multiplayer AI workspace with real-time spreadsheet collaboration between humans and agents, backed by conflict resolution logic.

featureClarity.evidence: Clear demonstration of agent and human co-editing a spreadsheet.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full loop of prompting, agent execution, and state update.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark mode UI, though some panels are crowded.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with the spreadsheet, chat, and trace paradigm.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture with real-time state transitions.

legibility.evidence: Most text is legible, but code font size is small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers of collaborative AI tools.

productionHonesty.evidence: Honestly presents the collaboration substrate as the core product.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet UI with live cell updates

defects.observed: Code snippet is highly detailed and hard to read in the brief time shown.
defects.fix: Simplify the code display or extend the duration of the slide.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Noderoom Live Collab: Multi-agent and human spreadsheet collaboration with built-in conflict resolution.

asset.title: Private Investment Room V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: A polished, narrated explainer video demonstrating AI agent collaboration in a financial spreadsheet room with robust versioning and proposal controls.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows spreadsheet collaboration and agent proposals clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates proposal, approval, and versioning sequence.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark UI with smooth zoom transitions.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with NodeRoom's multi-agent workspace narrative.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Realistic UI interactions and state changes shown.

legibility.evidence: Small spreadsheet text is hard to read without zoom.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly applicable to financial auditing and AI collaboration.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly denotes agent actions as reviewable proposals.

observedEvidence: Interactive spreadsheet with Q2/Q3 financial data
Agent 'Maya' proposing changes to the variance column
Version history panel showing edits by different users/agents
missingEvidence: Direct API execution trace or raw logs showing the agent's reasoning process in real-time.

defects.observed: Spreadsheet cell values and small labels are difficult to read before the zoom-in occurs.
defects.fix: Increase the default font size or apply a stronger zoom on the active spreadsheet area during narration.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: NodeRoom's Private Investment Room demonstrates how human teams and AI agents collaborate on financial spreadsheets with full version control and proposal-based approvals.

asset.title: Stack Before After V1
asset.purpose: Narrated explainer episode. Judge story clarity, visual design, proof quality, and whether it fits the README claim.

judge.summary: An excellent comparison video demonstrating the transition from a single-player Streamlit workflow to NodeRoom's collaborative, multi-player environment with human-in-the-loop agent approvals.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly contrasts a standard Streamlit pipeline with NodeRoom's collaborative spreadsheet and agent review features.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial state in Streamlit, the limitation slide, and the resolved collaborative workflow in NodeRoom.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode UI with clear focus areas, smooth transitions, and professional typography.

consistency.evidence: Features the standard NodeRoom components including the spreadsheet, research tab, and room trace.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic screen recording of the product interface showing live agent execution and cell-level updates.

legibility.evidence: UI text, spreadsheet cells, and side panels remain readable throughout the video.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for teams looking to integrate AI agents into collaborative financial or research workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the agent's proposal state and the manual approval step required by the user.

observedEvidence: NodeRoom collaborative research tab with account import
NodeRoom spreadsheet with agent-proposed cell edits and approval UI

defects.observed: Abrupt transition between the Streamlit demo slide and the NodeRoom interface.
defects.fix: Add a subtle fade transition to smooth the visual jump.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Compare a traditional single-player Streamlit pipeline with NodeRoom's collaborative environment, featuring real-time agent proposals and human-in-the-loop approvals directly inside a shared spreadsheet.
